overview.summary: LC_01 SimWorld is a modular Isaac Sim pipeline for campus/urban simulation. Anyplan was instantiated to standardize AI onboarding; core runtime and architecture docs already exist under doc/ and README.
highlights: Runtime: scripts/run_sim.sh -> main.py -> simulation.py -> scene, agents, robot, sensors, VFX
Algorithms testable in engine/ and tests/ without Isaac

roadmap.summary: Complete Anyplan bootstrap, then optional engineering/doc refactors without blocking feature work.

phases.title: Anyplan instantiation
phases.summary: Guidance instance, AI-Entry, manifest, doc-index, validation hooks.

phases.title: CI and test gate
phases.summary: GitHub Actions or local pre-push running unittest discover.

phases.title: Documentation layout unify
phases.summary: Optional merge doc/ into docs/architecture/ with link preservation.

phases.title: Config and contracts hardening
phases.summary: ScenePipelineConfig, reproducible plans per Architecture recommendations.

completedTasks.title: Modular SimWorld runtime
completedTasks.summary: main.py, simulation.py, scene pipeline, Spot, sensors, dynamic agents, VFX.

completedTasks.title: Engine-layer unit tests
completedTasks.summary: tests/ for dynamic contracts, ORCA/SUMO planners, export plan.

currentPhase.title: Anyplan instantiation
currentPhase.summary: Finish doc-index build, README Anyplan section, and validate artifacts. Defer Phase A–C unless owner schedules refactor.

tasks.title: Phase 0 closeout
tasks.summary: Optional: add .cursor rule pointing to AI-Entry; wire CI in Phase A.

tasks.title: Validate guidance and dashboard
tasks.summary: guidance.json and dashboard.json pass Anyplan schema validation.

tasks.title: README Anyplan section
tasks.summary: AI-Entry invocation, unittest command, validate script paths.

tasks.title: ADR 0001 Anyplan adoption
tasks.summary: Dual doc/docs roots and adoption scope recorded.

tasks.title: scripts/run_tests.sh wrapper
tasks.summary: Local test runner for PYTHONPATH=src/simworld unittest.
